generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using Docker"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, RealTimeSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MqttBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication using Eclipse Mosquitto"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, RealTimeSimulationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for hardware control"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing measured vs. simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlert
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTrajectoryTrace
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory for crane movement"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane movement results"
]

instance ValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when measured vs. simulated trajectory deviations exceed thresholds"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeTrajectoryTrace : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustments to crane control based on trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance Database : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database container"
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard container"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerator : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trajectory generation container"
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation container"
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Continuous validation container"
]

instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MQTT broker container"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for picking up pucks"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes, designed to move small pucks (representing containers) between locations, consisting of physical hardware including motors, controllers, and sensors, used as a Cyber-Physical System for digital twin research and education."
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, Database, Dashboard, TrajectoryGenerator, Simulation, ContinuousValidation, MqttBroker
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are sent to the physical crane via the Physical Crane Interface to execute movement trajectories."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation occurring at the operational time scale, as indicated by 'continuously logs' and 'continuously compares' in the documentation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with physical crane components interacting via MQTT and database; includes Physical Crane, Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI, and digital twin services (DB, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation, MQTT Broker) all deployed on a single computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), continuously monitoring and validating the physical crane during real-time operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against thresholds; validation results displayed with confidence bounds in Grafana dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time signaling between services; TimescaleDB for persistent data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard, with Python gantrylib module handling other services."
]
